name: django-templates-ext
description: Django template language support for VS Code
author: Albin Carlsson <inquires@albincarlsson.com>

scripts.vscode:prepublish: vp run django-template-language-server#build && vp run build

django.language-server.runtime.title: Language Server Runtime
django.language-server.runtime.description: Path to the node executable used to spawn the language server.

django.language-server.ls-path.title: Language Server Path
django.language-server.ls-path.description: Path to the language server entrypoint. Can be relative to the workspace or absolute.

django.language-server.runtime-args.title: Language Server Runtime Args
django.language-server.runtime-args.description: Additional arguments to pass to the node executable when spawning the language server.

django.language-server.port.title: Language Server Port
django.language-server.port.description: Port to use for debugging the language server. Negative values use the default inspector port 6009, non-negative values set an explicit inspector port for debug launches only.

django.templates.autoDiscover.title: Auto-discover Template Directories
django.templates.autoDiscover.description: Discover conventional directories named templates inside each workspace folder. Discovery is lazy and never executes Python or Django settings.

django.templates.roots.title: Additional Template Roots
django.templates.roots.description: Additional Django template roots. Relative paths are resolved against each workspace folder, absolute paths require a trusted workspace.

django.trace.server.description: Trace communication between VS Code and the language server.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: The extension requires workspace trust to execute workspace-specified language server settings.
